g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does deepseek analyse in round 1?')
g.text: Opens with full portfolio + news analysis. Builds initial scenarios.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does mistral challenge in round 2?')

sendPrompt('What does deepseek rebuttal cover in round 3?')
g.text: Responds to contrarian's challenges. Concedes valid points,
defends strong ones. Refines scenarios with quant's corrections.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does mistral do in round 4?')

sendPrompt('What does the arbiter produce as final output?')
g.text: Reads full transcript. Produces structured final output:
per-stock signals + scenario cards + confidence scores + action suggestions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the final structured output look like?')
g.text: Signals · Scenarios with % · Debate summary · Suggested actions
